6: SELECT CASE WHEN c1.Segment = 'SME' AND c2.Segment = 'LAM' THEN 'SME-LAM' WHEN c1.Segment = 'LAM' AND c2.Segment = 'KAM' THEN 'LAM-KAM' WHEN c1.Segment = 'KAM' AND c2.Segment = 'SME' THEN 'KAM-SME' END AS SegmentPair, AVG(c1.AnnualAvgConsumption) - AVG(c2.AnnualAvgConsumption) AS ConsumptionDifference FROM ( SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, AVG(ym.Consumption) AS AnnualAvgConsumption FROM customers c JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2013' AND c.CustomerID IN ( SELECT CustomerID FROM yearmonth WHERE strftime('%Y', Date) = '2013' GROUP BY CustomerID ORDER BY SUM(Consumption) ASC LIMIT 1 ) GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment ) c1 JOIN ( SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, AVG(ym.Consumption) AS AnnualAvgConsumption FROM customers c JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2013' AND c.CustomerID IN ( SELECT CustomerID FROM yearmonth WHERE strftime('%Y', Date) = '2013' GROUP BY CustomerID ORDER BY SUM(Consumption) ASC LIMIT 1 ) GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment ) c2 ON c1.Segment != c2.Segment GROUP BY SegmentPair	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
SELECT
    c.Segment,
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2012' AND c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS Consumption_2012,
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2013' AND c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS Consumption_2013,
    ROUND(
        (SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2013' AND c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
         SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2012' AND c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2012' AND c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100.0, 2
    ) AS PercentageIncrease
FROM
    yearmonth y
JOIN
    customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE
    c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
GROUP BY
    c.Segment
ORDER BY
    PercentageIncrease DESC;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
